title: getNetworkAnalysis
description: JSON Schema for getNetworkAnalysis response from Ribbon Health H1 API

insurance_id.description: A unique identifier for a single provider network from the Insurances reference endpoint.

ssa_codes.description: The SSA codes the network analysis was run on.

npi_count.description: How many unique NPIs accept the given insurance across all requested counties.

ssa_code.description: The SSA code of the county this data is for.

display.description: The display name of the county this data is for.

npi_count.description: How many unique NPIs accept the given insurance in this county.

npis.description:
The NPIs of providers who accept the given insurance in this county.

If the `exclude_npis` parameter was set to true, this key will not be present.
